initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. View code and data files (JSON, TypeScript, CSV, CSS, YAML, etc.) with syntax highlighting in an optimised, read-only viewer that eliminates editing lag.

initial_entry.name: Mantle Icons
initial_entry.author: Ryan Bakker
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Integrate visual iconography into your notes, folder directories, and sidebars. Pairs perfectly with the Zenith theme and features zero-bloat inline shortcodes.
